---
title: "S&P RatingsDirect (Available through S&P Capital IQ)"
page-layout: article
---

# S&P RatingsDirect (Available through S&P Capital IQ)

**Provider:** S&P

## Description

Credit research platform providing S&P ratings, reports, and analysis for global bond issues. Supports fixed income, credit risk, and public finance research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

To access, login to Capital IQ and select the Ratings Direct search option. Requires new users to register for an account.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://web.library.yale.edu/access-capital-iq)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
